about.title: About Us
about.story: Bafcon has been operating in Baku since 2016. With over 10 years of experience and 700+ successfully delivered apartments, we have become one of the most trusted interior design and renovation companies in the city.
about.mission: Our mission is to transform every space according to the owner's dream, combining functionality and aesthetics.
about.why3: From idea to execution — full service

services_page.title: Our Services
services_page.subtitle: Professional solutions for every project
services_page.renovation_full: Complete apartment renovation — from demolition to final assembly. Includes electrical, plumbing, flooring, painting, and decorative work.
services_page.construction_full: Professional construction services for new builds and reconstruction. Concrete work, roofing, facades, and flooring.
services_page.furniture_full: Custom furniture manufacturing — kitchens, wardrobes, bedroom and office furniture. Full cycle from design to installation.
